validation.hoursRange: Hours must be greater than 0 and at most 24
validation.dateNotFuture: The date can't be in the future

errors.EMAIL_ALREADY_EXISTS: An account with this email already exists
errors.EMAIL_NOT_VERIFIED: Email is not confirmed. Check your inbox or resend the confirmation email.
errors.INVALID_TOKEN: The confirmation link is invalid or has expired
errors.INVALID_REFRESH_TOKEN: Your session has expired, please sign in again
errors.PROJECT_NAME_ALREADY_EXISTS: A project with this name already exists

errors.INSUFFICIENT_ROLE: You don't have permission to do this

errors.ALREADY_PROJECT_MEMBER: This user is already a project member

errors.PARENT_TASK_PROJECT_MISMATCH: The parent task belongs to a different project
errors.ASSIGNEE_NOT_PROJECT_MEMBER: The assignee must be a member of the project
errors.INVALID_TARGET_POSITION: Invalid position in the column, please refresh the page
errors.TASK_STATUS_CONFLICT: Someone else already changed this task's status. The board has been refreshed — try again
errors.NOT_TIME_LOG_OWNER: Only the author or a project admin can delete this entry
errors.NOT_ATTACHMENT_OWNER: Only the uploader or a project admin can delete this attachment
errors.DUPLICATE_TAG_NAME: A tag with this name already exists in this project
errors.TAG_PROJECT_MISMATCH: This tag belongs to a different project
